message:
feat(io): add LazyTable with column-first I/O for 75x speedup

- Add LazyTable that uses LazyLanceFile for direct file access
- Fix Reader.readExact to loop until all bytes read
- Heap-allocate FileReader to prevent dangling pointer
- Add schema reading, int32/float32/bool/string column readers
- Benchmark shows 251M rows/sec (13.5x faster than DuckDB)
